name: Sherry's Soup
recipeIngredient: 7-8 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
3-4 carrots, halved and cut into strips
1/2 medium onion, chopped into large pieces (for easy removal)
can of green beans and/or corn, as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground meat with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Begin heating water in a large pot.
3. Add potatoes, thyme, tomato sauce, and diced tomatoes to the boiling water.
4. Drain any excess fat from the meat and add it to the pot.
5. Stir in barley and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Add the remaining ingredients (carrots, celery, onion, squash, bell pepper, green beans, and corn) and cook until the potatoes are tender.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed throughout the cooking process.
8. Allow the soup to cool before refrigerating or freezing for later consumption; it often tastes even better the next day.
